reviews.comment:

This is the second time they've refused to give me an invoice. That's illegal and will be reported to the AFIP (Argentine Federal Tax Authority).

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, pero la estación ya queda chica para la cantidad de turistas en temporada, solo dos surtidores (doble cara) para nafta, hicimos cola de 30 minutos para cargar. El resto bien.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but the station is too small for the number of tourists during peak season. There are only two (double-sided) gas pumps, so we had to wait in line for 30 minutes to fill up. The rest was fine.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtd3QzeE1BEAE
